examples: When I told her no, she ran up and handed me a tamale.
I sat in my car eating the best tamale I've ever had, and I just started to cry.
I thanked them again and walked back to my car and opened the foil on the tamale (I was starving by this point), and what did I find inside?
Some of the teams' hotels, particularly in a northern city, Tamale, were shoddy, and all were absurdly expensive.
That's -- (applause.) You do not want to be between Michelle and a tamale. (Laughter.) That is true.
